texto: His life-experiences, and reflections upon them, led Y to believe that the most difficult challenge in life was how to be kind, yet strong. ‘To be kind is not enough,’ he would say. ‘You have to be strong to give to others, and strong to withstand life’s fluctuating fortunes.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Arnold Zable sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “His life-experiences, and reflections upon them, led Y to believe that the most difficult challen…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, huaxi-watermill, kindness, útil em momentos de kindness e vida.
